Video.summary: High tides and clear skies make for another day in paradise here on Awesome Elements!

Awesome Elements | Only a Matter of Time

Video.summary: Whether you surf, roll, or fly, there’s something for you on this episode of Awesome Elements!

Video.summary: Whether in the city, the gym or their backyard, an athletes sanctuary is wherever they feel most confident.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Athlete Sanctuary

Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Athlete Sanctuary

Video.summary: The name of the game is train, compete, exceed, achieve.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Pure Greatness

Video.summary: There's nothing like getting on stage and performing your heart out.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Going All Out

Video.summary: These folks give it their all in the open air.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Amazing Outdoors

Video.summary: On two wheels, anything is possible.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Biking

Video.summary: Watch as these athletes impress with their mastery of martial arts.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Perfect Form

Video.summary: Pro skaters showcase their moves at the skate park and everywhere they can.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | House of Skate

Video.summary: These contortionists get bent out of shape!
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Totally Twisted

Video.summary: Take a walk on the unconventional side with these athletic innovators.
Video.title: Exhibition Awesome | Game Changers
